pages.text:
УКРАЇНА

МІНІСТЕРСТВО

ЗАКОРДОННИХ СПРАВ

"28 » February, 1991

ДРУ/203

Sir.

I have the honour to inform you that Ukraine has decided to become a member of the European and

Mediterranean Plant Protection Organization, #ith Article

Organization's Convention, as a country Invited in 1951 to accept the Convention,

and thus appearing

in Schedule II of the Convention.

The Government of Ukraine has

examined the

EPPO Convention and Rules of Procedure and agrees to contribute to the working

costs of the

Organization under the conditions stated in Aricle

XYIII Of the Convention and also its Schedule I.

The Official delegate of Ukraine to EPPO will be the Head of Plant Guarantine Service of

Ukraine mr. Movchan O.M.

Accept, Sir, the assurances of my

highest

cousideration.

A. Zlenko.

'inister fo oreign Affalrs of Ukrain

Minister for Foreign- Affairs of France,

Paris, France
